steps.title: Count the deposits
steps.content: The account starts with $520$ dollars at the beginning of week $1$. By the end of week $5$, Maya has made $5$ weekly deposits of $45$ dollars.

steps.title: Add deposits to the start
steps.content:
Add the $5$ deposits to the starting balance:
$$520+5(45)=520+225=745$$
The answer is D.
